charter.mission: Patch the weakest current layer, role-state separation, with a bounded set of market-observable microstructure and behavior features, then rerun the tiny core-skeleton pilot without widening scope.
in_scope: reuse the existing V1.12AM truth rows and time split
add a small role-patch feature layer with no future leakage
compare role-state accuracy and confusion buckets before and after the patch
success_criteria: the phase exposes whether role-state can be improved without widening geometry
it explains which patch family contributes most to role separation

interpretation: V1.12AO exists to patch the current weakest layer before any pilot widening is considered.
The right question is not whether more review is possible. The right question is whether role-state can improve with bounded non-leaking market-observable inputs.
